summary: Tested unified DutyStationDrawer component for photographer roles. All features working correctly: mode selector, role-based visibility, spot selector, stats preview, and mode switching with Framer Motion animations.

minor.issue: AxiosError on fetch - non-blocking, appears to be expected for users without bookings

critical_code_review_comments: DutyStationDrawer.js: Well-structured component with proper role-based visibility logic (lines 463-464)
Mode selector correctly hidden for Hobbyists via showOnDemand prop (line 78)
Mutual exclusion logic implemented correctly - Live turns off On-Demand and vice versa (lines 576-582, 609-614)
Framer Motion animations working smoothly for mode switching (layoutId='modeBackground')
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
TopNav.js: DutyStationIcon correctly imported and used for photographer roles (lines 7, 168-170)
context_for_next_testing_agent: DutyStationDrawer is the new unified component replacing BlueLiveIcon and OnDemandDutyIcon. It uses glass-morphism UI with Framer Motion animations. Role-based visibility: Hobbyists see only Live mode, Photographers/Approved Pro see both modes.

duty_station_icon_visibility.details: DutyStationIcon visible in TopNav for both Photographer and Hobbyist roles

mode_selector_photographer.details: Mode selector shows both Live and On-Demand buttons for Photographer role

mode_selector_hobbyist.details: Mode selector correctly hidden for Hobbyist - only Live mode available

mode_switching.details: Clicking On-Demand switches mode, status card updates to 'Go On-Demand', icon changes to Zap

status_card.details: Status card visible with correct text for each mode

spot_selector.details: Spot selector appears with search functionality and tier-based range display

stats_preview.details: Stats preview shows $0 TODAY and 0 SESSIONS

framer_motion_animations.details: Mode selector background slides smoothly between Live and On-Demand
